description.short: Create branded comparison flyers and email them to buyers
description.full: A Copilot agent for InTownHomes sales reps. Enter your listing details and a competitor listing, and the agent generates a professional branded PDF comparison flyer and emails it directly to the buyer. Highlights InTownHomes premium features like rainscreen siding, 2x6 walls, Navien tankless water heaters, and spray foam insulation.
